## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy, performance tracking, and next steps for Homebase's SEO and content initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Implementing new performance tracking metrics, including target keyword performance and organic keyword growth](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Shifting focus to revamping existing calculator pages and building programmatic SEO content around them](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Prioritizing the hourly salary calculator refresh and state-specific payroll calculation pages](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Continuing production of "how to start a business" content due to positive conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2154.0)

## Topics

### Performance Tracking Updates

  - [Expand view to mid-October (post-migration) for overall performance assessment](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Track performance against target keywords for each page](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Monitor total organic keywords and consider clustering by topic (e.g., payroll, starting a business)](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Aim to measure cost per keyword, click, and impression for resource allocation](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [Focus on revamping existing calculator pages (e.g., hourly salary calculator)](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Build programmatic SEO content around calculator pages (e.g., state-specific payroll calculation guides)](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Utilize Gusto's payroll calculator as inspiration for improvements](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)
  - [Continue producing "how to start a business" content (both state-specific and business-type specific)](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2154.0)

### Interlinking Strategy

  - [Implement a more robust interlinking strategy for new and existing content](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Explore AI-assisted methods for identifying interlinking opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Consider manual review for glossary interlinking to ensure strategic placement](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)

### Blog Structure Improvements

  - [Acknowledge current disorganization of blog categories and structure](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)
  - [Plan for blog consolidation and improvement project in H2 2023](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [GrowthX team to provide recommendations for blog structure optimization](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2069.0)

### Content Feedback Process

  - [Review Victoria's feedback document for content improvements](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [Address actionable feedback items (highlighted in red) and mark as complete (green) when finished](https://fathom.video/share/-sbsXiQUJLV4ewAx5L-zJxDzEbnxQ_7Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)

## Next Steps
